item.title: COOLWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: COOLWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
COOLWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]
item.description:
COOLWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
COOLWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]

item.title: How to Restore Deleted Files on Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: How to Restore Deleted Files on Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
How to Restore Deleted Files on Mac
(Utilities)
Digitalcameraundelete.com provides simples how to restore deleted files on Mac application that provides finest means to revive accidentally erased and virus infected multimedia data and important documents from removable media SD memory cards, MMC cards, Mini SD cards, Micro SD cards, SDHC cards, Smart media, Memory stick pro, picture cards and other similar devices. Effective memory card data rescue software for Mac executes deep scan search algorithm on removable memory card devices and provides complete details of files and folders once stored on removable storage media with option to automatically retrieve all found files in simple click or manually reform selected data files. Advanced how to restore deleted files on Mac program executes efficiently on all versions of Apple Macintosh operating system and restores lost data files from removable memory card media at desired location of computer hard disk drive. Proficient data recovery application for Mac provides most convenient user interaction interface having complete manual help guide at every step of disk scanning and data restoration process for ease so even novice user can also operate without requiring any special guidance. Affordable how to restore deleted files on Mac provides user finest option to have preview of scanned pictures, videos, documents etc before performing actual data restoration process. Effective data recovery software for Mac machines performs safe and quick data retrieval having support for memory card devices of all major brand manufacturers of MMC cards.Features* Memory card data recovery software revives lost and missing files from logically crashed SD cards.* Removable memory card data rescue application rescue files lost due to accidentally formatted cards.* How to restore deleted files on Mac software provides simple interface with complete help manual.

[read more]

[read more]

Digitalcameraundelete.com provides simples how to restore deleted files on Mac application that provides finest means to revive accidentally erased and virus infected multimedia data and important documents from removable media SD memory cards, MMC cards, Mini SD cards, Micro SD cards, SDHC cards, Smart media, Memory stick pro, picture cards and other similar devices. Proficient data recovery application for Mac provides most convenient user interaction interface having complete manual help guide at every step of disk scanning and data restoration process for ease so even novice user can also operate without requiring any special guidance. item.title: ColorCode [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:title: ColorCode [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:author: cable8
item.itunes:summary:
ColorCode
(Tactics & Strategy)
Giving Qt/Cpp a try - inevitable for a KDE addict - led to ColorCode, a free advanced MasterMind clone
* lots of game variants, from the very easy up to really challenging ones, achieved by combinations
of any color count from 2-10 with any column count from 2-5 (you can also select one of the 5 level presets)
* 2 different game modes (Human vs. Computer/Computer vs. Human)
* allow or not pegs of the same color, display letter or number indicators or change the colors while playing
* automatically close the rows after the last peg is set to hurry up playing
* hide the menubar, toolbar, statusbar and/or the Timer and scale the game window to your needs
* English, German, Czech, French, Hungarian and Spanish translations available
* now it has a rather intelligent ;-) built in MasterMind solver - so you can let the computer guess for you
(nope, he's not cheating - really)

And, on the edge of losing you may always restart the same game avoiding the scandal :-D

[b]for more screenshots visit:[/b]
[u][url]http://colorcode.laebisch.com/screenshots[/url][/u]

[b]for documentation visit:[/b]
[u][url]http://colorcode.laebisch.com/documentation[/url][/u]

[b]for downloads visit:[/b]
[u][url]http://colorcode.laebisch.com/download[/url][/u]
[read more]
item.description:
ColorCode
(Tactics & Strategy)
Giving Qt/Cpp a try - inevitable for a KDE addict - led to ColorCode, a free advanced MasterMind clone
* lots of game variants, from the very easy up to really challenging ones, achieved by combinations
of any color count from 2-10 with any column count from 2-5 (you can also select one of the 5 level presets)
* 2 different game modes (Human vs. Computer/Computer vs. Human)
* allow or not pegs of the same color, display letter or number indicators or change the colors while playing
* automatically close the rows after the last peg is set to hurry up playing
* hide the menubar, toolbar, statusbar and/or the Timer and scale the game window to your needs
* English, German, Czech, French, Hungarian and Spanish translations available
* now it has a rather intelligent ;-) built in MasterMind solver - so you can let the computer guess for you
(nope, he's not cheating - really)

And, on the edge of losing you may always restart the same game avoiding the scandal :-D

[b]for more screenshots visit:[/b]
[u][url]http://colorcode.laebisch.com/screenshots[/url][/u]

[b]for documentation visit:[/b]
[u][url]http://colorcode.laebisch.com/documentation[/url][/u]

[b]for downloads visit:[/b]
[u][url]http://colorcode.laebisch.com/download[/url][/u]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ColorCode
(Tactics & Strategy)
Giving Qt/Cpp a try - inevitable for a KDE addict - led to ColorCode, a free advanced MasterMind clone
* lots of game variants, from the very easy up to really challenging ones, achieved by combinations
of any color count from 2-10 with any column count from 2-5 (you can also select one of the 5 level presets)
* 2 different game modes (Human vs. Computer/Computer vs. Human)
* allow or not pegs of the same color, display letter or number indicators or change the colors while playing
* automatically close the rows after the last peg is set to hurry up playing
* hide the menubar, toolbar, statusbar and/or the Timer and scale the game window to your needs
* English, German, Czech, French, Hungarian and Spanish translations available
* now it has a rather intelligent ;-) built in MasterMind solver - so you can let the computer guess for you
(nope, he's not cheating - really)

And, on the edge of losing you may always restart the same game avoiding the scandal :-D

[b]for more screenshots visit:[/b]
[u][url]http://colorcode.laebisch.com/screenshots[/url][/u]

[b]for documentation visit:[/b]
[u][url]http://colorcode.laebisch.com/documentation[/url][/u]

[b]for downloads visit:[/b]
[u][url]http://colorcode.laebisch.com/download[/url][/u]
[read more]

item.title: Recovering Mac Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recovering Mac Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Recovering Mac Files
(Utilities)
Recovering Mac Files software is highly reliable and advanced picture restoration tool which recovers entire lost and erased photographs, images, snapshots, wallpapers and other graphic files in less time and affords. Mac photo recovery application offers excellent disk scanning and preview facility to search all deleted files and restore them on specified location in Mac system as per user requirement. Image retrieval software is easy to operate and support interactive working environment to easily recover missing data from digital storage media by all categories of users without requiring any technical knowledge. Mac picture salvage tool instantly restores misplaced graphic files and folders from hard disks and digital removable devices including pen drive, Secure Digital Card, Memory Stick PRO, Multi Media Card, XD Picture Card, mobile Phone, Compact Flash, thumb drive, jump drive, digital camera and others. Users can safely recover damaged files from all data loss situations like virus attacks, accidental deletion, disk crash, drive format, software malfunctioning, hardware failure, emptied trash folder and other logical problems. Photo restoration utility for Mac supports different brands of USB removable devices like Nikon, Kingston, Transcend, Panasonic, Samsung, Kingston, Ricoh, Sanyo, Casio and many more. Users can download demo version of Recovering Mac Files software from company website to evaluate features and functionalities before buying licensed version application.Features:* Elegant software recovers lost image and photographs from hard disk drive and USB media on Mac.* Offers simple and effective user interface to easily recover files by technical and non technical users.* Supports advanced disk scanning mechanism to restore all lost pictures saved in different formats.

[read more]

item.title: Recover Photos from Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Photos from Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Photos from Mac
(Utilities)
Recover Photos from Mac tool is wholly talented to retrieve your all missing text files, images, pictures, snapshots, audio/video clipping, songs and other valuable data from removable storage media. Don’t be bothered if you have lost your crucial photos, snapshots, data, files etc because with the assistance of this advance utility you can amazingly recover your vital documents instantly. Recover Photos from Mac Software facilitates you to recuperate your corrupted or lost data from hard disk, memory card, USB drive and other types of removable device. Recover Photos from Mac application supports data recovery of lost files from removable storage like memory card, pen drives, and key drives. Recover Photos from Mac retrieves files from many data failure reasons like Inaccessible flash drive, Improper usage, Logically crashed digital USB drive, virus or malware attack, Accidentally formatted USB removable storage media etc. Recover Photos from Mac renews deleted or erased data from a variety of removable device storage media. Recover Photos from Mac easily renovates files from any data failure and disasters. Recover Photos from Mac get back vanished pictures, images, audio-video albums with long file names. Economical Recover Photos from Mac offers Preview of renovation data in tree structure before actual recovery. Reliable Recover Photos from Mac is easy to use and even you don’t necessitate any technical knowledge to operate this smart application.Features:* Recover Photos from Mac tool facilitates attractive GUI with inbuilt help manual while you make data recovery on Mac OS X. * Free demo of Recover Photos from Mac is available to evaluate its features and working ability. * Recover Photos from Mac Utility facilitates Preview of restored data in tree structure before actual recovery.

[read more]

item.title: Post Office Barcode Label Generator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Post Office Barcode Label Generator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Post Office Barcode Label Generator
(Office Apps)
Easy to download Post Office Barcode Label Generator application provides simplified way to create banking statement bar code stickers in minimal efforts and time. Time saving mailing barcode label generating software empowers user to create rich quality bar code stickers for postal services like speed post and courier without any expert’s help. Company provides barcode tags designing tool that is fully capable to create 2D and linear font bar code stickers at minimal cost price.

[read more]

item.title: Simple File Transfer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Simple File Transfer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: clearall2
item.itunes:summary:
Simple File Transfer
(Utilities)
[For Windows only]
This small application can send and receive files between Windows computers in local network.

If you have knowledge about networking or your network has IPv6, you can even transfer over the internet (instructions below).

Features:
-Send and receive multiple files.
-Send and receive simultaneously.
-Unlimited file size.
-Can transfer over local network or even the internet.
-Support both IPv4 and IPv6.
-Support UPnP protocol.
-Integrated Chat.
-Local Peers.
-Be updated automatically via SFT Updater.

Privacy policy:
-This product does not collect, save, transmit key strokes when user types in.
-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.


Our suggestion for transfering files over the internet (if you don't have IPv6):
-Download and install free Radmin VPN at https://www.radmin-vpn.com
-Join/create your own network, share with friends.
-You can send/receive files now, using IP address from VPN.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me
[read more]
item.description:
Simple File Transfer
(Utilities)
[For Windows only]
This small application can send and receive files between Windows computers in local network.

If you have knowledge about networking or your network has IPv6, you can even transfer over the internet (instructions below).

Features:
-Send and receive multiple files.
-Send and receive simultaneously.
-Unlimited file size.
-Can transfer over local network or even the internet.
-Support both IPv4 and IPv6.
-Support UPnP protocol.
-Integrated Chat.
-Local Peers.
-Be updated automatically via SFT Updater.

Privacy policy:

-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.


Our suggestion for transfering files over the internet (if you don't have IPv6):
-Download and install free Radmin VPN at https://www.radmin-vpn.com
-Join/create your own network, share with friends.
-You can send/receive files now, using IP address from VPN.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me
[read more]

Simple File Transfer
(Utilities)
[For Windows only]
This small application can send and receive files between Windows computers in local network.

If you have knowledge about networking or your network has IPv6, you can even transfer over the internet (instructions below).

Features:
-Send and receive multiple files.
-Send and receive simultaneously.
-Unlimited file size.
-Can transfer over local network or even the internet.
-Support both IPv4 and IPv6.
-Support UPnP protocol.
-Integrated Chat.
-Local Peers.
-Be updated automatically via SFT Updater.

Privacy policy:
-This product does not collect, save, transmit key strokes when user types in.
-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.


Our suggestion for transfering files over the internet (if you don't have IPv6):
-Download and install free Radmin VPN at https://www.radmin-vpn.com
-Join/create your own network, share with friends.
-You can send/receive files now, using IP address from VPN.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me
[read more]

item.title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.description:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]

item.title: Aspect [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Aspect [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: sludwig
item.itunes:summary:
Aspect
(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

[read more]

(Graphic Apps)

item.title: Unerase Digital Picture Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Unerase Digital Picture Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Unerase Digital Picture Tool
(Utilities)
Photo retrieval application is cost effective tool that retrieves all your misplaced family album, lost digital snapshots or deleted pictures from Windows hard disk drive, memory cards (including Mini sD, xD picture card, compact flash, MMC card etc.), digital camera of any mega pixel resolution and other removable USB storage media. Erased picture recovery utility is GUI based that supports restoration of all major file formats including jpg, mpg, jpeg, gif, riff, tiff or bmp. Retrieval software for digital images unerase erased digital photo files even if system generated error messages like “Drive Not Detected” or "Drive Not Formatted” are being displayed on your computer screen while accessing media. Digital image salvage tool recovers encrypted snaps lost due to unwanted circumstances like virus attack, media formatting, logical crash, corruption of master boot record, software/hardware malfunctioning or human error. File rescue software for digital photographs is compatible with all major manufacturers including Konica-Minolta, Transcend, Samsung, Hitachi, Panasonic, PRETEC, Sony, Western Digital, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji film, Olympus and other manufacturers. Erased picture restoration utility facilitates with thumbnail preview of retrievable digital files before saving them at user specified location.Features:* Digital photo retrieval program restores all lost picture albums from hard disk drive, inaccessible USB memory devices or damaged camera memory card.* Digital snaps backup tool uses advanced file recovery algorithms to easily regain lost snaps even after corruption in MBR, MFT, DBR and FAT.* Erased picture recovery application undelete deleted pictures and supports every type of digital card reader on your computer.* Damaged image salvage tool is compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10=,Windows 8, 7, XP and Vista.

[read more]
item.description:
Unerase Digital Picture Tool

Photo retrieval application is cost effective tool that retrieves all your misplaced family album, lost digital snapshots or deleted pictures from Windows hard disk drive, memory cards (including Mini sD, xD picture card, compact flash, MMC card etc.), digital camera of any mega pixel resolution and other removable USB storage media. Erased picture recovery utility is GUI based that supports restoration of all major file formats including jpg, mpg, jpeg, gif, riff, tiff or bmp. Digital image salvage tool recovers encrypted snaps lost due to unwanted circumstances like virus attack, media formatting, logical crash, corruption of master boot record, software/hardware malfunctioning or human error. File rescue software for digital photographs is compatible with all major manufacturers including Konica-Minolta, Transcend, Samsung, Hitachi, Panasonic, PRETEC, Sony, Western Digital, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji film, Olympus and other manufacturers. Erased picture restoration utility facilitates with thumbnail preview of retrievable digital files before saving them at user specified location.Features:* Digital photo retrieval program restores all lost picture albums from hard disk drive, inaccessible USB memory devices or damaged camera memory card.* Digital snaps backup tool uses advanced file recovery algorithms to easily regain lost snaps even after corruption in MBR, MFT, DBR and FAT.* Erased picture recovery application undelete deleted pictures and supports every type of digital card reader on your computer.* Damaged image salvage tool is compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10=,Windows 8, 7, XP and Vista.

[read more]

Unerase Digital Picture Tool
(Utilities)
Photo retrieval application is cost effective tool that retrieves all your misplaced family album, lost digital snapshots or deleted pictures from Windows hard disk drive, memory cards (including Mini sD, xD picture card, compact flash, MMC card etc.), digital camera of any mega pixel resolution and other removable USB storage media. Erased picture recovery utility is GUI based that supports restoration of all major file formats including jpg, mpg, jpeg, gif, riff, tiff or bmp. Retrieval software for digital images unerase erased digital photo files even if system generated error messages like “Drive Not Detected” or "Drive Not Formatted” are being displayed on your computer screen while accessing media. Digital image salvage tool recovers encrypted snaps lost due to unwanted circumstances like virus attack, media formatting, logical crash, corruption of master boot record, software/hardware malfunctioning or human error. File rescue software for digital photographs is compatible with all major manufacturers including Konica-Minolta, Transcend, Samsung, Hitachi, Panasonic, PRETEC, Sony, Western Digital, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji film, Olympus and other manufacturers. Erased picture restoration utility facilitates with thumbnail preview of retrievable digital files before saving them at user specified location.Features:* Digital photo retrieval program restores all lost picture albums from hard disk drive, inaccessible USB memory devices or damaged camera memory card.* Digital snaps backup tool uses advanced file recovery algorithms to easily regain lost snaps even after corruption in MBR, MFT, DBR and FAT.* Erased picture recovery application undelete deleted pictures and supports every type of digital card reader on your computer.* Damaged image salvage tool is compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10=,Windows 8, 7, XP and Vista.
